sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10331" key="a)ntiperiagwgh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιπερι-ᾰγωγή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n10331.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">contrary revolution,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.2</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg002:4:34" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Hyp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.34</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="2" id="n10331.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> in midwifery, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rotatory movement</tr_> used in extracting the afterbirth, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:73" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.73</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
